mnemonics: Mother Helps Dogs Run In Nice Oceanic Spaces
Many Desert Trees Wear Lovely Greenery Regularly
keyPoints: A hierarchy of living organisms (plants, animals, microbes) interact with each other and their environment.
Different biomes have unique characteristics such as climate, vegetation, and wildlife.

Forest ecosystems: canopy, understory, shrub layer, forest floor; desert: cactus, succulents, sand dunes; wetlands: aquatic plants, mudflats, salt marshes; riverine: aquatic plants, riverbanks, floodplains; oceanic: phytoplankton, zooplankton, marine life.
